given: Sentry AI conversation rendering receives a message made of multiple content parts

should_find.finding: conversation message utilities assume a single-part message shape, so multi-part AI conversation messages are not rendered or parsed correctly

notes.body: Regression seed from Sentry fix ce32ccf8e820cf565c91ba9760c36df87dda353f. conversation message utilities assume a single-part message shape, so multi-part AI conversation messages are not rendered or parsed correctly
